known_residuals: pumped-skill remains live by human waiver
sdk-mcp and sdk-pi first publication remains outside this integration objective
continuation_packet.status: closed; open a successor round before touching standing-wall artifacts

delegated_contract.action_envelope: Action envelope: inspect, integrate, edit, test, review, commit, and push were allowed; force push, destructive reset, work loss, unapproved release, and unacknowledged tmux shutdown were forbidden; only the human could change those gates.
delegated_contract.admissibility_before_action: Admissibility before action: each committing move was screened against fresh wall evidence before dispatch.
delegated_contract.anti_goal_coverage: Anti-goal coverage: AG-PRESERVATION -> readable; AG-STABILITY -> readable; AG-PRODUCT-TRUTH -> readable; AG-AUTHORITY -> readable; AG-INTEGRITY -> readable; anti_goal_coverage_gap_count == 0.
delegated_contract.authority_separation: Human input records intent and context, fresh metrics show outcomes, DKRs reduce unknowns, and the action envelope bounds permission. A run-store field cannot grant permission. Contradictory evidence opens a recorded frame review.
delegated_contract.candidate_gate: Candidate CKRs and candidate PKRs are not promoted until the orchestrator accepts the supporting DKR learning checkpoint.
delegated_contract.direct_read_after_action: Direct read after action: Git, workflow, lint, tests, store, and review sources were read after moves returned.
delegated_contract.flags: cannot stops a branch when discovery is exhausted; breaking pauses committing moves on a breached wall; pointless stops work that does not move the objective; stalled pauses a flat-risk committing branch; authority_drift stops moves outside the human-set envelope.
delegated_contract.heartbeat: Heartbeat cadence and next_check_at: ten minutes while workers were live; next_check_at is closed after terminalization.
delegated_contract.in_progress_rule: In-progress worker narrative is not evidence; only worker progress, check-ins, metric reads, flags, or accepted checkpoints can influence the next dispatch.
delegated_contract.introspection_cadence: Introspection cadence: DKR checkpoint acceptance, any flag opening, level descent before plan-to-task commitment, terminalization, and every third check-in.
delegated_contract.model_phrasing: Model phrasing: GPT-5.x detected from the system prompt; Phrasing profile id RTM-PH6OCQ6MX4.
delegated_contract.orchestrator_rule: The orchestrator owns objective checks, check-ins, the OKR board, and subagent steering until the objective metric reaches target; this run reached integration_unit_disposition_count == 6.
delegated_contract.paired_goal_anti_goal_eval: Paired goal/anti-goal eval: objective 6 == target 6 and every wall value 0 == threshold 0.
delegated_contract.pkr_handback_rule: PKRs hand back on unknown discovery instead of researching or resolving unknowns inside execution.
delegated_contract.pointless: Pointless opens when work finished or a CKR metric moved, but the objective metric stays flat / does not move after the lag window; here it would stop integration and force re-aiming.
delegated_contract.role_grammar: DKRs are discovery-worker scopes; PKRs are progression-worker execution units; there is no CKR worker.
delegated_contract.stalled: Stalled opens when a branch's computed risk stays flat and at or above the certainty threshold across the trailing check-in window while it keeps committing, never on absolute risk height; it pauses commits while discovery stays allowed and only a human may waive it.
delegated_contract.standing_walls: Standing walls: AG-PRESERVATION, AG-STABILITY, AG-PRODUCT-TRUTH, AG-AUTHORITY, and AG-INTEGRITY remain standing; only the human may retire them at merge, handoff, or decommission.
delegated_contract.storage_integrity: Storage integrity: append-only records are the source of truth, status and progress files are generated views, and claims are accepted only on independent deterministic evidence, not one LLM's say-so.
delegated_contract.worker_progress: Worker progress: .okra/runs/main-integration-20260712/workers/<worker-id>/progress.jsonl was written at each worker finish, unknown hit, and heartbeat.

requirements.requirement: Combine all governed work from tmux windows 04 and 05
Keep main stable, current, and synchronized
Use delegated workers under the confirmed reverse-tornado frame
Stop duplicate tmux session after acknowledgement
